Bitcoin needs to maintain the 2021 level to avoid further decline after hitting a ten-day low and rebounding. Bulls eye two crucial price points.
news.summary: After reaching a ten-day low, Bitcoin has seen a rebound in its price. Currently, there are two specific price points for Bitcoin that are pivotal for bullish investors. This signifies a potential turning point in the market's sentiment towards the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Is Cambridge becoming UK's Silicon Valley?.
Orexo Q3 2024: Net revenues SEK 136.5m, EBITDA SEK -0.7m, Net earnings SEK -41.9m, Cash SEK 114.9m, EPS SEK -1.21.
news.summary: In Q3 2024, Orexo AB reported total net revenues of SEK 136.5 million, down from SEK 156.1 million in the same period last year. The EBITDA was SEK -0.7 million compared to SEK -9.5 million previously, and net earnings were SEK -41.9 million compared to SEK -33.3 million. The US Commercial segment saw net revenues of SEK 131.0 million. Cash flow from operating activities was SEK -13.4 million, with cash and cash equivalents totaling SEK 114.9 million. Earnings per share were SEK -1.21. Orexo AB's sustainability efforts were ranked in the top 5% globally by EcoVadis. The company received a letter from the FDA regarding additional data for OX124. The financial guidance for 2024 remained unchanged. Additionally, after the period, a phase 1 clinical study was initiated for OX640 for allergic rhinitis participants.

news.headline: TÜV Rheinland partners with Lenovo for 2024 supplier standards conference in China promoting green manufacturing.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on October 24, 2024, Lenovo Group partnered with TÜV Rheinland Greater China, an international third-party testing organization, for an event on October 15. The collaboration involved the "2024 Lenovo" initiative.

news.headline: Dedicare's Q3 2024 net sales at SEK 460.9 million, EBITA at SEK 11.2 million, both lower than the previous year.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, a company in Stockholm reported net sales of SEK 460.9 million, showing a decrease compared to the previous year. The EBITA was SEK 11.2 million, down significantly from SEK 40.6 million in the same period last year. After adjusting for non-recurring items, the EBITA was SEK 19.0 million, also lower than the previous period. The EBITA margin was 2.4 percent, down from 7.7 percent, and when adjusted for non-recurring items, it was 4.1 percent. The EBIT for the period was SEK 9.0 million.

news.headline: NVIDIA NIM Agent Blueprint enhances AI virtual assistants for customer service, boosting efficiency and personalization. #innovation #AI
news.summary: Discover how NVIDIA's NIM Agent Blueprint is revolutionizing AI virtual assistants in customer service, elevating performance and customization in various sectors. This advancement has resulted in a significant improvement in efficiency, accuracy, and personalization, benefiting industries worldwide. The blueprint is paving the way for a new era of customer service, with noticeable enhancements across the board.

news.headline: Binance finishes Worldcoin (WLD) mainnet integration, enabling deposits and withdrawals. A major milestone in crypto.
news.summary: Binance recently completed the integration of Worldcoin's (WLD) mainnet into its system, enabling users to conduct deposits and withdrawals. This development represents a major milestone for the cryptocurrency exchange.

news.headline: Hytera Communications introduces 2 new body camera models to enhance digital evidence acquisition, revolutionizing management.
news.summary: Recently, in Shenzhen, China, Hytera Communications introduced two new models of body cameras showcasing their latest advancements in communication solutions.

Sobi report: Q3 2024 revenue up 33%, reaching SEK 6,894M; strong pipeline momentum.
news.summary: Today, Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (Sobi®) released its third quarter 2024 report, revealing a significant increase in total revenue. Specifically, revenue surged by 33 percent to SEK 6,894 million, translating to a 39 percent growth at constant exchange rates (CER). Notably, Haematology revenue also experienced growth during this period.

news.headline: Eramet acquires Tsingshan's stake in Argentina lithium venture, deal with undisclosed amount.
Hexagon Composites ASA will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, at 07:00 am CET. Presentation at 08:30 am by Chair and CFO.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, Hexagon Composites ASA is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, at 07:00 am CET. The Chair of the Board, Knut Flakk, along with CFO David Bandele, will discuss the results at 08:30 am on the same day. This presentation is highly anticipated by shareholders and analysts, hoping for insights into the company's performance.

news.headline: Estonia and UAE enhance cooperation in digital economy and innovation; Estonian ICT Trade Mission explores joint investments.
news.summary: Delegates from the Republic of Estonia, led by government organization Trade Estonia, undertook an ICT trade mission to the UAE on October 24, 2024. This mission aimed to strengthen bilateral relations and explore joint investment opportunities between the two countries. The Estonian delegation engaged with key stakeholders in Dubai, focusing on enhancing cooperation in the ICT sector. This initiative underscored Estonia's commitment to expanding its global partnerships.

news.headline: Traders favour a half-point ECB interest-rate cut in December.
First patient dosed in Phase I/II trial of PFL-002/VERT-002 by Pierre Fabre for NSCLC with MET alterations, a targeted therapy.
news.summary: Pierre Fabre Laboratories has initiated a Phase I/II clinical trial for PFL-002/VERT-002, a new targeted therapy designed to address non-small cell lung cancer in patients with MET alterations. The first patient has already been dosed with this innovative monoclonal antibody. This treatment offers a unique mechanism of action and has the potential to provide significant benefits to individuals suffering from this type of cancer. This trial marks a significant step forward in the development of potentially life-saving treatments for lung cancer patients.

news.headline: Aurzen's EAZZE D1 projector ranked #1 New Release on Amazon US, now launched on Amazon Europe.
news.summary: A renowned entertainment technology brand, Aurzen, from Frankfurt AM MAIN, Germany, revealed that their EAZZE D1 projector, recently named the top New Release Projector on Amazon in the US, can now be purchased on Amazon throughout Europe. The EAZZE D1 has gained significant popularity, ranking number one upon its release on Amazon in the US, and is now accessible to a wider audience in Europe.

Study in Nigeria shows PharmaJet's Tropis ID needle-free delivery increased polio immunization coverage, saved costs, and was preferred over traditional methods.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Nigeria has demonstrated notable advancements in routine polio immunization efforts. The implementation of this program showcased enhanced coverage rates, cost-effectiveness, and a strong preference for the PharmaJet Tropis ID delivery method. This study has significant implications for public health strategies, particularly in regions like Nigeria where polio immunization is crucial for combating the disease. The favorable outcomes observed in the study highlight the potential for improving vaccination campaigns, with potential cost savings and increased efficiency.

news.headline: BE Semiconductor Industries N.V. reports Q3-24 revenue of €156.6M with net income of €46.8M, up 27.0% and 33.7%. Orders reach €151.8M, up 19.2% from Q3-23. Hybrid bonding adoption continues.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 20XX, revenue for the company reached €156.6 million, showing an increase of 27.0% compared to the same period last year. Net income also rose to €46.8 million, marking a 33.7% growth from Q3-23. Orders received in Q3-24 amounted to €151.8 million, reflecting a substantial 19.2% increase from the previous year. The adoption of hybrid bonding technology continues to progress.

news.headline: Arctech secures 2.3GW Saudi solar project, reaches 15GW in MEA. Important deal for SkyLine II tracking system.
news.summary: In Xiamen, China, on October 24, 2024, Arctech, a top solar tracking and racking solutions company, announced a major deal for its 1P single-axis solar tracking system, SkyLine II. The agreement was signed with China Energy Engineering Group Co., Ltd. This deal signifies a step forward in the industry, highlighting the demand for Arctech's cutting-edge technology. The agreement is set to boost solar energy projects and underscores the strategic partnership between these leading companies. This collaboration is expected to bring significant advancements in the renewable energy sector, supporting the growth of sustainable energy solutions.

news.headline: Sinch predicts trends for 2024 Black Friday & Cyber Monday. Personalization, conversational commerce, & trust key factors in  shopping season.
news.summary: This year's shopping season is marked by a focus on personalization, conversational commerce, and trust. Sinch (XSTO: SINCH), a leading provider of Customer Communications Cloud services, is at the forefront of revolutionizing global communication. Based in Atlanta and Stockholm, the company is setting new standards for how businesses connect with their customers.

news.headline: Shipshape partners with Wayne Pumps to offer monitoring for smart sump pumps. Enables real-time monitoring and alerts.
news.summary: Shipshape has collaborated with Wayne Pumps to provide advanced monitoring services for Wayne's intelligent sump pumps through the Shipshape app. This partnership allows homeowners to track their sump pumps in real-time, get alerts for maintenance, and link other household devices for a smooth operation. This partnership brings together Shipshape's expertise in monitoring technology with Wayne Pumps' innovative sump pumps, enhancing the user experience. The integration is expected to benefit millions of Wayne Pumps customers, who will now have access to this premium monitoring service.

news.headline: AstroTurf restores Pisgah High football field submerged under 15 feet of water post Hurricane Helene in record time.
news.summary: Following the aftermath of the remnants of Hurricane Helene, Western North Carolina experienced severe flooding, leading to Pisgah High School's football field being submerged under approximately 15 feet of water. The field suffered extensive damage and was covered with layers of silt. In response, Pisgah High School sought assistance from AstroTurf for emergency renovations.

news.headline: Former Dubai radio presenter Rakesh Thomas transitions to the US real estate scene, winning 'Rising Star Award' in Portland.
news.summary: Rakesh Thomas, a former radio host in Dubai for more than 15 years, has transitioned to the competitive real estate market in Portland, USA. His impressive career shift has now put him in the global spotlight. Recently, Rakesh was honored with the prestigious 'Rising Star Award' in Portland, marking a significant achievement in his new venture.

news.headline: Recosoft releases PDF2ID Professional Suite 2025- convert PDFs to Adobe® InDesign® & Office formats, extract graphics.
news.summary: Releasing its latest software suite, Recosoft Corporation, known for creating workflow automation plugins and tools for Adobe Creative Cloud®, has launched PDF2ID Professional Suite 2025. This suite boasts PDF2ID Professional 2025, the premier PDF-to-InDesign tool, and DecksMoveIn 2025, a unique addition to the offerings.

news.headline: All Access with Andy Garcia explores highway safety, covering autonomous vehicles and everyday heroes. Exciting journey ahead!
news.summary: Exploring the realm of highway safety, 'All Access with Andy Garcia' delves into the topic, shedding light on crucial aspects. The show, premiering in Los Angeles on October 24, 2024, provides viewers with valuable insights into everyday heroes and autonomous vehicles. It presents an in-depth analysis of highway safety, aiming to increase awareness among the audience. Through this exploration, the show seeks to educate the public and highlight the importance of safety measures on the roads, ultimately striving to reduce accidents and save lives.

news.headline: Escape the city buzz at Yerba Buena Gardens, San Francisco's oasis of calm. Nestled amidst the bustling streets, find tranquility and creativity.
news.summary: Discover peace and inspiration in the bustling city at Yerba Buena Gardens in San Francisco. Situated in the heart of Fort Lauderdale, this urban sanctuary provides a serene retreat for residents and visitors alike. Opened on October 24, 2024, this tranquil haven offers a break from the city's fast-paced lifestyle. With an area of 87 acres, Yerba Buena Gardens is a thriving hub of creativity within the vibrant streets of San Francisco. Visit this oasis to experience a slice of nature amid the urban landscape.

news.headline: Meiyume showcases beauty innovations at Cosmopack Asia 2024, debuting at AsiaWorld-Expo with theme "Elevate."
news.summary: A renowned B2B beauty manufacturer, Meiyume, has recently made its debut at Cosmopack Asia 2024 in Hong Kong at the AsiaWorld-Expo (AWE). The event, themed "Elevate: Reaching New Heights in Beauty Innovation," showcased Meiyume's cutting-edge technology and innovation. The exhibition attracted a significant number of attendees, including industry professionals and beauty enthusiasts, with over 200 exhibitors participating. Meiyume's presence at the event highlights its commitment to pushing the boundaries of beauty innovation in the B2B sector.

news.headline: Nomios boosts cybersecurity services by acquiring Dionach with Keensight Capital support, expanding offerings.
news.summary: Nomios, a renowned European cybersecurity and network services specialist, has revealed the purchase of Dionach, a cybersecurity services provider based in the UK. This significant acquisition allows Nomios to enhance its service portfolio by incorporating Dionach’s top-notch penetration testing, cybersecurity audit, and compliance services. The acquisition received backing from Keensight Capital, a prominent private equity firm focused on pan-European Growth, consolidating Nomios' position in the market.

Fingerprint Cards AB will present third quarter 2024 results on October 31, 2024 at 9:00 am CET through a telephone conference and webcast.
news.summary: Fingerprint Cards AB, also known as Fingerprints™, is set to conduct a telephone conference and webcast presentation to discuss its third-quarter 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, starting at 9:00 am Central European Time.

news.headline: Statkraft secures EU support of up to 107 million euros for hydrogen production plant in Emden, Germany. Output: 20,000 tonnes/year H2, 50,000 MWh/year green heat.
news.summary: Statkraft, the largest producer of renewable energy in Europe, has received support from the European Union for its initiative to establish a hydrogen production facility in Emden, Lower Saxony. The company is in talks to secure a subsidy of potentially 107 million euros for the project, involving a 200 MW electrolysis plant and a 50 MW heat pump system. This endeavor could result in the production of up to 20,000 tonnes of renewable hydrogen and 50,000 MWh of green heat annually. Additionally, Statkraft currently provides district heating to industrial clients in Emden through a biomass plant. The financial backing is anticipated to come from the EU Innovation Fund, which aims to advance innovative technologies for reducing greenhouse gas emissions across Europe.

news.headline: Aker Horizons (OSE: AKH) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 1, 2024, at 07:00 CEST with online presentation at 08:30 CEST.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Aker Horizons (OSE: AKH) announced that their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 will be released on November 1, 2024, at 07:00 CEST. The presentation of these results will take place online at 08:30 CEST on the same day. Be sure to mark your calendars for this important update on Friday, November 1, 2024.

news.headline: Co-op partners with Quadient in the UK to offer parcel lockers, enhancing convenience for communities.
news.summary: Today, Quadient (trading as QDT on Euronext) announced a partnership with Co-op in the UK to expand parcel locker availability and enhance convenience for communities. This collaboration aims to promote secure and sustainable business connections.

Dow records worst session in over a month, Apple and NVIDIA drag Nasdaq down. Fear Index remains in 'Greed' zone. McDonald's shares fell by over 5%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in the market sentiment, remaining within the "Greed" zone on Wednesday. The U.S. stock market saw a decline, marked by the Dow Jones index having its worst session in over a month. Both the Dow and S&P 500 experienced losses for the third consecutive session. Megacap stocks such as Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) and NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) dropped by more than 2% during the day. McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) witnessed a significant decrease of over 5% due to CDC reports linking an E. coli outbreak to quarter pounders. AT&T Inc (NYSE:T) also reported...Find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tick sizes for select spot trading pairs on Binance will change from November 4, 2024, to boost liquidity and trading.
news.summary: Starting November 4, 2024, Binance will be implementing changes to tick sizes for selected spot trading pairs to improve market liquidity and trading efficiency. This adjustment aims to enhance the overall trading experience on the platform.

news.headline: Join BitMEX's Uptober Trading Competition for a chance to win 3 BTC, 7,500 USDT, and VIP swag. Exciting prizes awaits!
news.summary: The Uptober Trading Competition organized by BitMEX is calling all traders to participate and stand a chance to win exciting rewards. Participants have the opportunity to win prizes such as 3 BTC, 7,500 USDT bonuses, and exclusive VIP merchandise. Take part in this competition to showcase your trading skills and potentially walk away with these attractive prizes.
